CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Shippers (Id INT PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(100), Status VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Shippers (Id, Name, Status) VALUES (1, 'Shipper A', 'Active');
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Shippers (Id, Name, Status) VALUES (2, 'Shipper B', 'Inactive');
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Shippers (Id, Name, Status) VALUES (3, 'Shipper C', 'Active');
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Orders (OrderId INT PRIMARY KEY, ShipperId INT, Amount DECIMAL(10,2), FOREIGN KEY (ShipperId) REFERENCES Demo.demo.Shippers(Id));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Orders (OrderId, ShipperId, Amount) VALUES (101, 1, 50.00);
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Orders (OrderId, ShipperId, Amount) VALUES (102, 2, 75.50);
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Orders (OrderId, ShipperId, Amount) VALUES (103, 3, 100.00);
SELECT * FROM Demo.demo.Orders WHERE ShipperId IN (SELECT Id FROM Demo.demo.Shippers WHERE Status = 'Active');
REPL_UPDATE_SNAPSHOT ('Demo.demo.Orders', (SELECT ShipperId FROM Demo.demo.Shippers WHERE Status = 'Inactive'));
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Shippers_Aggregate AS (SELECT ShipperId, COUNT(*) AS OrderCount FROM Demo.demo.Orders GROUP BY ShipperId);
REPL_UPDATE_SNAPSHOT ('Demo.demo.Shippers', (SELECT MIN(Id) FROM Demo.demo.Shippers WHERE Status = 'Active'));
REPL_UPDATE_SNAPSHOT ('Demo.demo.Shippers', (SELECT DISTINCT ShipperId FROM Demo.demo.Orders WHERE Amount > 60.00));
REPL_UPDATE_SNAPSHOT ('Demo.demo.Orders', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Demo.demo.Orders WHERE Amount < 100.00));
